data.reasoning: Both models failed to analyze PKGBUILD (critical build script) due to erroneous binary file classification, leaving zero files reviewed.
coverage_issues: Critical gap: PKGBUILD skipped by both models despite being text file
No review of install hooks, source files, or network-access code
false_negatives: Entire package functionality unassessed - potential build/install risks undetected
Network/filesystem operations in gsutil source code unreviewed
re_audit_focus: gsutil source files (especially those handling network ops)
learnings: Fix binary detection: Use file(1) or MIME checks instead of extension-based heuristics
Prioritization failure: Must always review PKGBUILD first even if misclassified
Add fallback mechanism when critical files are skipped
Improve error handling: Treat binary classification of text files as critical failure
